TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Macaran, title = Macaran, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Macaran} }

S.FORM: alang Macaran ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 193 buwan, 420 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 333 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 87 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Paywan 27%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Macaran hya' ga Maljipa. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Macaran ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Botan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 193 buwan, 420 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 333 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 87 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Paywan 27%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Macaran hya' ga Maljipa. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maʦ~ʨaran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βotan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na maʦ~ʨaran ħjaʔ ɣa maljipa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
